name: NSCLC Post-Osimertinib
note: 58-year-old female with stage IIIB non-small cell lung cancer, EGFR exon 19 deletion confirmed on tissue biopsy. Progressed on osimertinib after 14 months. Prior platinum-based chemotherapy (carboplatin + pemetrexed, 4 cycles). ECOG performance status 1. PD-L1 TPS 45%, TMB 8 mut/Mb, TP53 co-mutation. Mild hepatic impairment (Child-Pugh A). No active autoimmune disease. No prior immunotherapy. eGFR 72 mL/min. Age 58.

expected_profile.diagnosis: stage IIIB non-small cell lung cancer

notes: Post-third-gen EGFR TKI progression. Key question: eligibility for 4th-line EGFR-directed therapy or immunotherapy trials.
